markdown:
# Swimming

While you're swimming, each foot of movement costs 1 extra foot (2 extra feet in [[difficult_terrain]]). You ignore this extra cost if you have a [[swim_speed]] and use it to swim. At the DM's option, moving any distance in rough water might require a successful DC 15 Strength ([[athletics]]) check.
